title: lolium rigidum var. teres
intro: Lolium rigidum var. teres, commonly known as rigid ryegrass or green ryegrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to soothe anxiety and promote relaxation. Lolium rigidum var. teres can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or compress to apply topically.
